# SystemPackageProvider

**Enumeration**

The system package providers that this package uses.

## Declaration

```swift
enum SystemPackageProvider
```

## Providing Hints to Users of System Packages

- **apt(_:)**: Creates a system package provider with a list of installable packages for users of the apt-get package manager on Ubuntu Linux.
- **brew(_:)**: Creates a system package provider with a list of installable packages for people who use the HomeBrew package manager on macOS.
- **nuget(_:)**: Creates a system package provider with a list of installable packages for users of the NuGet package manager on Linux or Windows.
- **yum(_:)**: Creates a system package provider with a list of installable packages for users of the yum package manager on Red Hat Enterprise Linux or CentOS.

## Enumeration Cases

- **SystemPackageProvider.aptItem(_:)**: Packages installable by the apt-get package manager.
- **SystemPackageProvider.brewItem(_:)**: Packages installable by the HomeBrew package manager.
- **SystemPackageProvider.nugetItem(_:)**: Packages installable by the NuGet package manager.
- **SystemPackageProvider.yumItem(_:)**: Packages installable by the Yellowdog Updated, Modified (YUM) package manager.

## Configuring System Packages

- **pkgConfig**: The name to use for C modules.
- **providers**: An array of providers for a system target.
